title: Device Home Screen - Unpair connected Headset
scenario: Verify that unpairing a connected headset via phone Bluetooth settings correctly shows it as disconnected in the app.
steps: 1. Ensure a headset is paired and connected to the phone via Bluetooth.
3. Unpair (forget) the headset from the phone's Bluetooth settings.
4. Open the app and observe the headset status.
expected: The app correctly shows the headset as disconnected.
